alert.name: AldoTel · SLO fast burn (14.4x)
alert.message: Error rate has exceeded 1.44% over the last 5 minutes - that is a 14.4x burn of a 99.9% SLO (0.1% budget), which exhausts the monthly error budget in ~2 days. Fast-burn, page-worthy. See the SLO / Error-Budget dashboard (burn-rate over time + multi-window table).
